title: Lead Instructional Designer at IL&FS Skills

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IL&FS Skills
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Instructional Designer in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
